case_title: MARIA GUADALUPE REMIREZ MEDINA VS. AZTECA TAGUERIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDINA, MARIA GUADALUPE REMIREZ AS TO DEFENDANT AZTECA TAGUERIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDINA, MARIA GUADALUPE REMIREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZTECA TAGUERIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $11,822.91 PRINCIPAL, $199.06 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,321.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDINA, MARIA GUADALUPE REMIREZ AS TO DEFENDANT AZTECA TAGUERIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
